Program_AdminRequired_Text:
This installer requires administrator privileges.

Please right-click and select 'Run as administrator'.
Program_GameRunning_Text:
Please close Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic first.

The installer cannot modify game files while the game is running.
Program_UninstallError_Text:
Could not determine the KOTOR installation path.

Please run the installer normally to reinstall.
Welcome_Description:
This installs the KOTOR Accessibility mod for Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (Steam).

The mod lets blind and visually impaired players play KOTOR with the NVDA screen reader.
Welcome_GameDescription:
The mod patches your Steam copy of Knights of the Old Republic.

If you don't own KOTOR yet, you can buy it from Steam. Otherwise click Next to choose what gets installed.
ModdingInfo_Description:
The KOTOR Accessibility installer is more than just a screen-reader hook. It bundles a small, hand-picked set of community mods so a blind playthrough runs without hitting the well-known softlocks.

Use Tab or arrow keys to read each line. Press Next to continue, or Back to cancel.
ModdingInfo_BundleBody:
- KOTOR Accessibility mod (this project): screen-reader output, keyboard navigation, audio cues.
- KotorPatcher runtime: the small loader that lets the accessibility DLL hook into the game.
- Prism speech bridge: talks to NVDA, JAWS, and Narrator. Replaces the older Tolk library.
- KOTOR 1 Community Patch (K1CP): the foundational bugfix compilation. Without it, a blind playthrough is at real risk of unrecoverable softlocks on Tatooine, Manaan, and elsewhere.
- Swoop Bike Upgrades: restores two cut upgrade items. Pure data, language-agnostic.
ModdingInfo_FiltersBody:
- Visual / texture / model / camera mods (no value for blind users).
- English-only restoration mods (TTS jumping between languages mid-conversation is jarring).
- Combat or stat rebalances that diverge meaningfully from vanilla.
- New questlines with new VO (out of scope, almost always English only).
ModdingInfo_OptionalBody:
- Thematic KOTOR Companions (companion attribute rebalance, gated behind a 'strict-vanilla vs vanilla-plus' toggle on the next page).
- Widescreen / FOV patch (QoL, language-agnostic).
- Juhani Dialogue Restoration & Party Conversations on Ebon Hawk — verified language-agnostic; restore vanilla cut dialog using existing localised text + VO.
ModdingInfo_FootnoteHeading: A note on Italian and Spanish
ModdingInfo_FootnoteBody: K1CP only ships official translation patches for German, French, and Russian. Italian and Spanish installs receive K1CP in English — this is a known limitation; if your install is one of those, the bugfix text will appear in English even though the rest of the game stays localised.
Main_StatusInstall:
This installs the KOTOR Accessibility mod into your Steam copy of Knights of the Old Republic.
The mod enables blind players to play using NVDA or another screen reader.
Main_StatusUpdate: This updates the KOTOR Accessibility mod to the latest version.
Main_BrowseDialogDescription: Select the KOTOR installation folder (contains swkotor.exe)
Main_PathNotFound:
swkotor.exe was not found in the selected folder.
Please select the correct KOTOR installation folder.
Main_ReadmeCheckBox: Open the getting-started guide in the browser
Main_ConfirmInstall_Format:
Install KOTOR Accessibility to:
{0}

The installer will create a backup of swkotor.exe before patching.

Continue?
Main_VersionCheckFailed_Text:
Could not check for the latest mod version.

This may be because:
- No internet connection
- GitHub repository not found
- No releases published yet

Do you want to try downloading the mod anyway?
Main_ModDownloadFailed_Format:
Could not download the mod: {0}

The installation cannot continue without the .kpatch file.

You can download it manually from:
{1}/releases
and re-run this installer.
Main_CompleteModInstalled: The accessibility mod is installed and ready. Launch KOTOR and press Numpad-1 in the main menu to check that speech is working.
Main_CompleteModUpdated: The accessibility mod has been updated successfully.
Program_UpToDate_Format:
KOTOR Accessibility v{0} is already installed and up to date.

Would you like to perform a full reinstall?
Uninstall_Description: This removes the accessibility mod and restores swkotor.exe from the install-time backup.
Uninstall_Confirm_Text:
Are you sure you want to uninstall KOTOR Accessibility?

This will:
- Restore swkotor.exe from backup
- Remove KotorPatcher.dll, sqlite3.dll, addresses.db, patch_config.toml
- Remove the patches\ folder (accessibility.dll + prism.dll)
- Remove the Add/Remove Programs entry
Logger_SaveLog_Errors:
There were warnings or errors during the operation.

Would you like to save a log file to your Desktop for troubleshooting?
Logger_SaveLog_Normal: Would you like to save a log file to your Desktop?
